Fork PRs now get workflow url instead of timing out

sglang.title: [CI] reapply max-parallel in `stage-b-test-small-1-gpu`
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add it back when we migrate from 1-gpu to stage-b-test-small-1-gpu.
cc @alisonshao. Please control the max-parallel during the migration process; otherwise, severe starvation will appear.

sglang.title: [model-gateway]: add qwen coder tool parser support xml format for qwen3 coder and microthinker
sglang.author: whybeyoung
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Add a new Qwen Coder XML format tool parser for the Rust Router (sgl-model-gateway).
Qwen Coder models use a distinct XML-based tool call format that differs from the standard Qwen JSON format:
<tool_call>
<function=execute_bash>
<parameter=command>pwd && ls</parameter>
</function>
</tool_ca

This pr implements dp-attention support for llama model and llama eagle3 model, make it possible to run both --enable-dp-attention and --speculative-algorithm EAGLE3.

Adapt LayerCommunicator to llama model

sglang.title: [model-gateway] Improve Health Check Logging
sglang.author: xuwenyihust
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current worker health check will only log transport level errors, but won't warn on 400/500 status code.
Example
python3 -m sglang_router.launch_router \
	--host 0.0.0.0 \
	--port 30000 \
	--backend openai \
	--api-key XXXXXXX \
	--worker-urls https://api.openai.com \
	--log-level deb

vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
I have noticed that the flaky tests in Entrypoints Integration Tests are often related to tool calling, so I have decided to group the Responses API tests (which contain many of those tool calling tests) together to be run separately, reducing the cost of retrying these tests.

NoteStreamlines attention metadata construction and removes unused CPU-side fields.

build_attn_metadata now takes max_seq_len and no longer uses seq_lens_np or num_computed_tokens_cpu; dropped NumPy dependency in attn_u

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Remove async barrier
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, the model runner V2 prevents race conditions by introducing async_barrier, which is difficult to reason about and error-prone.
This PR eliminates the need for async_barrier by avoiding the race condition by design. The core idea is double buffering, allocating two copies of states, where

vllm.title: [Model] Avoid hardcoding pooling type
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Gracefully handle user-specified pooling types where possible, instead of silently ignoring them.
In the next PR, we will work on passing EmbeddingPoolerHead to head argument so that pooling params are applied correctly.
